hero.title: Stop chatting with AI.
hero.description: Cherry Agent is a desktop AI Agent. Give it one command, and it organizes files, processes data, generates reports — not conversation, real action.
typewriterScenes: Organize my Downloads folder by file type
Extract amounts from these 50 receipts into a spreadsheet
Analyze this sales data and find the fastest-growing category

showcase.title: Clean yet powerful interface
showcase.description: A thoughtfully designed conversation UI that keeps you focused on interacting with AI

item1.title: Chat with AI for 30 minutes, still do it yourself
item1.desc: Regular AI chatbots only give suggestions — they don't actually do the work. You spend 10 minutes explaining what you need, get a wall of text, then copy-paste and do everything manually.

item2.title: Subscribed to 3 AI tools, paying $60+/month
item2.desc: ChatGPT Plus, Claude Pro, various plugins... each does a little, but none can truly handle everything. Money spent, efficiency barely improved.

item3.title: Want AI to process local files, but afraid to upload
item3.desc: Company docs, financial data, personal photos... you know AI could help, but uploading files to the cloud just doesn't feel right.

whatItIs.line2: An AI employee living on your computer.
whatItIs.description: Cherry Agent runs on your desktop, directly handling local files, processing data, and generating documents. Say what you need — it gets it done. No copy-pasting, no switching between windows.

memory.title: Gets smarter over time
memory.desc: Automatically remembers your work habits, project context, and preferences. No need to re-explain — it already knows what you want.

privacy.title: Your data stays on your machine
privacy.desc: All conversations and files are stored locally, never uploaded to the cloud. Your data, your eyes only.

skills.title: Install skills, do anything
skills.desc: Built-in skills for document processing, code review, data analysis, and more. Add your own too — like installing apps for your AI.

extensible.title: Choose your model freely
extensible.desc: Support the full Claude lineup (Haiku, Sonnet, Opus). Choose from lightweight-fast to deep-reasoning. Pay-as-you-go, more cost-effective than subscriptions.

useCases.title: Time saved? Enough for two extra coffees
useCases.subtitle: These tasks used to take hours. Now, one sentence.

fileManagement.title: File Organization
fileManagement.desc: Auto-sort your Downloads folder by type, rename files, flag duplicates — chaos to order in seconds.

receiptProcessing.title: Receipt Processing
receiptProcessing.desc: Extract dates, merchants, and amounts from receipt photos. Auto-generate expense reports. Monthly reimbursement, done.

dataAnalysis.title: Data Cleaning
dataAnalysis.desc: Clean sales data — remove duplicates, fill missing values, standardize formats, generate analysis reports.

meetingNotes.title: Meeting Notes
meetingNotes.desc: Extract action items from multiple meeting notes, categorize by owner, generate weekly summaries. Nothing falls through the cracks.

step2.title: Tell it what you need
step2.desc: Use natural language — no commands to learn, no syntax to remember.

step3.title: Sit back and watch
step3.desc: Cherry Agent picks the best model and skills automatically, and gets the job done for you.

items.q: How is this different from ChatGPT / Claude official apps?
items.a: The biggest difference is Cherry Agent can directly work with files and data on your computer — not just chat. It has a skill extension system where you can add new capabilities like installing apps. Plus, all data stays local.

items.q: How can you offer lower prices than official subscriptions?
items.a: We use pay-as-you-go pricing — you only pay for what you use, no monthly subscription required.
Cherry Agent uses pay-as-you-go pricing. You get free credits on signup, then pay based on actual usage.

Supports the full Claude lineup: Claude Haiku 4.5 (fastest, most cost-efficient), Claude Sonnet 4.6 (strongest overall), Claude Opus 4.6 (deepest reasoning). The system auto-recommends based on task complexity, and you can also choose manually.
All conversation data is stored on your local device. We never upload or store any of your conversations. Your data is entirely under your control.
You can submit issues through the in-app feedback feature or join our community for help. We respond to every piece of feedback as quickly as possible.

items.q: How do I manage AI permission policies?
items.a: Cherry Agent uses a least-privilege policy by default — sensitive operations like file access and command execution require your confirmation in the UI. You can also configure auto-approval in settings to let AI handle batch tasks more efficiently. You stay fully in control.

providers.title: Powered by the Full Claude Lineup
providers.subtitle: From Anthropic — lightweight to deep reasoning, covering every workflow

claude.title: Full Claude Lineup
claude.desc: Anthropic's top-tier AI, excelling at complex reasoning, code generation, and precise task execution
features: Granular permission control with step-by-step confirmation

routing.title: Smart Model Routing
routing.desc: Automatically recommends the best model for each task — Haiku for speed and economy, Sonnet or Opus for complex work. Fully in your control.

smartModel.title: Smart Model Selection
smartModel.desc: Automatically recommends the best model based on task complexity — uses Haiku for simple tasks to save costs, switches to Sonnet or Opus for complex tasks, fully under your control.

skillSystem.title: Skill Extension System
skillSystem.desc: Infinitely extend AI capabilities through skill plugins — PDF processing, web search, code generation, document writing, install and use with one click.

crossPlatform.title: Cross-Platform & Secure
crossPlatform.desc: Supports macOS and Windows, data stored locally, conversations never uploaded to the cloud, your privacy belongs to you.

security.title: Transparent, controllable, trustworthy
security.subtitle: From permissions to data, every step is under your control

permissions.title: Permission Transparency
permissions.desc: Least-privilege by default. Sensitive operations like file access and command execution require your confirmation. You always know what AI is doing and can stop it anytime.

enterprise.title: Enterprise Control
enterprise.desc: Admin panel for centralized permission policies, model whitelists, and usage quotas to meet team compliance requirements.

data.title: Data Security
data.desc: Conversations and files are stored entirely on your local device, never passing through third-party servers. API communication is fully encrypted, and keys are managed by you.

userGuide.title: User Guide
userGuide.subtitle: From beginner to proficient in 5 minutes, with screenshots for every step

what.label: Chapter 1
what.title: What is Cherry Agent?
what.subtitle: AI that works for you, not just chats

s1.title: It actually does things, not just talks
s1.description: Ordinary AI (like ChatGPT) only gives you answers — you still have to do the work yourself. Cherry Agent is different: it can directly operate your computer, organize files, search the web, and generate spreadsheets. You describe the task, it executes it, and you can watch every step in real time.

s2.title: 6 capabilities covering everyday work
s2.description: File management, data processing, content creation, research, work collaboration, and personal productivity. Open the app and find 40 ready-to-use tasks — click to start immediately with zero learning curve.

firstTask.label: Chapter 2
firstTask.title: Send Your First Task
firstTask.subtitle: 5 steps, up and running in 3 minutes

s1.title: Get to know the interface
s1.description: Open Cherry Agent. On the left is your conversation history; in the center are task categories (File Management, Data Processing, Content Creation, etc.). Click any preset task to start instantly, or type any instruction in the input box at the bottom.

s2.title: Click "New Task"
s2.description: Click the "+ New Task" button in the top-left corner. A session setup window will appear where you need to configure two things: the working directory and the AI model.

s3.title: Choose a working directory (important)
s3.description:
The Agent operates only within this directory — it can only read and write files inside this folder and won't touch anything outside.

Tip: Move the files you want to process into a single folder, then select that folder as the working directory. For example, select your photos folder when organizing photos, or your spreadsheets folder when working with Excel files.
s3.tip: Think of the working directory as the Agent's "workbench" — it can only operate within this boundary, so all your other files are completely safe from accidental changes.

s4.title: Choose an AI model
s4.description:
For everyday tasks, choose Claude Haiku 4.5 (fastest, lowest credit usage). For complex analysis or writing, choose Claude Sonnet 4.6 (more powerful). For highly complex tasks, choose Claude Opus 4.6.

Not sure which to pick? Keep the default — the system will automatically recommend the best model for your task.

s5.title: Describe your task and send
s5.description: Type what you want done in the input box — the more specific, the better. After sending, you can watch the Agent's "thinking process": it analyzes the task, calls tools, and executes step by step. The entire process is transparent, and you can pause or intervene at any time.

settings.label: Chapter 3
settings.title: Personalization
settings.subtitle: Help the Agent understand you better

s1.title: Memory: let the AI remember you
s1.description:
In Settings → Memory, write down frequently used information such as your name, profession, work habits, and project context. The Agent will automatically reference this information in every conversation, so you never have to re-explain.

For example, add "I'm an architect who uses AutoCAD" and the Agent will automatically factor in your background when answering related questions.

s2.title: Skills: enable or disable features
s2.description:
Settings → Skills contains 17 built-in skills including web browsing, code generation, brainstorming, and data analysis — enable or disable them as needed.

You can also install custom skills to extend the Agent's capabilities, just like installing apps on your phone.

s3.title: Appearance: light or dark mode
s3.description: Settings → Appearance lets you switch the interface theme (Light / Dark / System) and the display language (Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, English, Japanese).

s4.title: Sync: seamless across devices
s4.description:
Enable Settings → Sync to automatically back up your conversation history, memory data, and skill configurations to the cloud every 5 minutes.

When you get a new computer or reinstall the system, simply log in to your account to fully restore all your data — nothing is lost.

billing.label: Chapter 4
billing.title: Credits & Recharge
billing.subtitle: Pay only for what you use

s1.title: What are credits?
s1.description:
Credits are Cherry Agent's usage currency. 1 credit = ¥0.1 RMB. Each conversation consumes credits — the amount depends on the model used and the length of the conversation.

• Claude Haiku 4.5: fewest credits, best for everyday tasks
• Claude Sonnet 4.6: moderate usage, strongest overall performance
• Claude Opus 4.6: most credits, best for highly complex tasks

s2.title: Daily check-in: get free credits
s2.description: Open the app every day to check in and earn free credits. Consecutive check-ins earn bonus rewards. This is the simplest way to accumulate credits for free — just make it a daily habit.

s3.title: Which monthly plan to choose?
s3.description:
Three monthly plans based on usage intensity:

• Agent Plus ¥300/mo: 175 credits/day — for light use (1–2 small tasks per day)
• Agent Pro ¥788/mo: 525 credits/day — for daily work (multiple tasks per day)
• Agent Max ¥1,399/mo: 1,400 credits/day — for heavy use

Daily credits reset at midnight. Plans can be stacked.

s4.title: Top up credits as needed
s4.description:
Don't want a monthly plan? Top up credits directly starting from ¥50, with ¥1,000 = 10,000 credits.

Supports WeChat Pay, Alipay, and international credit cards (Visa, MasterCard). Credits are added to your account instantly after payment.

referral.label: Chapter 5
referral.title: Refer Friends & Earn
referral.subtitle: Share with friends and earn commission on every recharge

s1.title: Find your referral code
s1.description: Go to Settings → Referral to find your unique referral code (e.g., E52WYT) and referral link. Share the link with friends, or have them enter your code when registering — this establishes the referral relationship.

s2.title: Friends recharge, you earn commission
s2.description:
Every time a referred friend recharges, you earn a commission proportional to their payment. Records appear in the Commission tab. After approval, you can withdraw to your Alipay account.

For withdrawal issues, contact customer support on WeChat: JsnonoChat.
